transcript: What is he doing? He is going in the middle of the street when he is talking. He seems to be really going to burn himself. I can't bear it even if I stab him with a small bullet in the leg of Santhosh. This family is going to burn him alive and leave him alone, isn't it? I don't know anything. This family is going to burn alive and leave me alone. Who am I to tell you this? Nå, vi har en lukasin.
